data.title: 国际服例行维护27
data.summary: [11/29 Scheduled Maintenance Notice] Sensei, we will be undergoing a scheduled maintenance on 11/29
data.body:
[11/29 Scheduled Maintenance Notice]
Sensei, we will be undergoing a scheduled maintenance on 11/29 (Tue).

Maintenance Period: 11/29 (Tue) 2:00 – 10:00 AM (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/102217

※Maintenance times may change based on conditions.

[Extended Maintenance Notice]
11/29(Tue) Maintenance has been extended.

Maintenance is now due to end at 12:00 PM (UTC)

Notices will be provided if there are further delays.
We apologize for the inconvenience.
